import React, {createRef} from 'react'; import axios from 'axios'; class PlayerForm extends React.Component { inputRef = createRef(); submitPlayer(event) { event.preventDefault(); axios.post('http://localhost:4000/players', { firstName: this.inputRef.firstName.value, lastName: this.inputRef.lastName.value, email: this.inputRef.email.value, phone: this.inputRef.phone.value, iscoach: this.inputRef.iscoach.value, team: this.inputRef.team.value, speed: this.inputRef.speed.value, strength: this.inputRef.strength.value, endurance: this.inputRef.endurance.value, ability: this.inputRef.ability.value, techniques: this.inputRef.techniques.value, tactical: this.inputRef.tactical.value, }) .then((response) => { console.log(response); }) .catch((error) => { console.log(error); }); } render() { return (

Add a new player

); } } export default PlayerForm;
